title: Speaking - Part 4
description: The examiner will ask you questions related to the theme from Part 3. Express and develop your opinions with your partner.

content.task: Discussion on mass tourism and its consequences.

questions.question: Do you think tourism causes more harm than good to local communities and the environment?
Should governments limit the number of tourists visiting popular destinations?

script.text: Some people say that travelling abroad gives you a much better understanding of the world than simply reading about it. Do you agree?
Thank you. That is the end of the test.
